description: Safe Facebook Pages publishing with brand-voice, image-required & anti-duplication checks.
name: io.github.anthonyjbolo/mcp-fb-publisher

environmentVariables.description: Long-lived Meta Graph API user or page token. Required for publishing.
environmentVariables.name: META_USER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your config.yaml (per-page brand voices, banned topics, image policy).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_FB_PUBLISHER_CONFIG

environmentVariables.description: Inline JSON config (alternative to file path, useful for serverless deploys).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_FB_PUBLISHER_CONFIG_JSON

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for image generation via gpt-image-1 (optional).
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: fal.ai API key for image generation via Flux Pro (optional).
environmentVariables.name: FAL_KEY

title: Facebook Publisher
